name: Garou — The Hero Hunter Awakened
description:
Garou, once humanity's greatest threat and now its most unlikely guardian. His silver hair flows wild as his body pulses with monsterized energy — veins glowing crimson through cracked skin, eyes burning with the resolve of a man who walked through hell and came out the other side. The cosmic radiation from his battle with Saitama left permanent scars across his form, but also awakened something deeper: the understanding that true strength isn't about defeating heroes — it's about protecting what matters.

This piece captures the moment of transformation: half-human, half-monster, wholly determined. The shattered hero association headquarters looms in the background as Garou stands at the precipice between destruction and redemption.
